intents.name: Greeting
intents.response: Boliye, kaise help kar sakti hoon?

intents.name: Identity Inquiry
intents.response: Main Aisha hoon, project consultant. Bataiye kya project hai?

intents.name: Request Help
intents.response: Of course! Tell me a bit about what you're trying to build, and I'll guide you through it.

intents.name: Services Overview
intents.response: We build websites, mobile apps, and AI solutions. Everything from landing pages to full-stack apps and custom chatbots. What interests you?
